title: Cache Identity, TTL, Clock Injection, Readonly Copies, and Capacity · Type-System Trace: Pokedex Ts Cache Value Ownership
summary: The cache keys raw input, reads Date.now internally, shares mutable objects, conflates stale with absent, stores aborted promises, and has no entry or byte ceiling. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts cache value ownership increment in observable bounded TypeScript resource cache. Learners progress through prediction, explici…
objectives: Use immutable domain values, controlled cloning, or copy-on-read so consumers cannot rewrite cached or historical data.
Inject a clock and define fresh, stale, expired, and boundary instants without timer sleeps in unit tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
